cadence_note: BCE republishes its statistical Excel workbooks (monetary & financial, external sector, public finances, national accounts, prices) on rolling monthly-to-quarterly cycles; the fastest-moving series (monetary, external sector) refresh monthly, national accounts quarterly. A ~30-day re-observation catches the monthly workbooks while avoiding redundant fetches of the quarterly/annual ones. Files are served at stable path-based URLs and overwritten in place on update.
